focus: Establish a minimal but real Hermes backbone for remote-viewing and broader psi-functioning operations, centered on controlled tasking, remote session intake, feedback release, structured storage, and basic analysis, while explicitly deferring live market execution and premature system sprawl.
principles: blindness and protocol discipline where required
paper and analysis before real-money execution
markdown is the primary continuity layer

human_roles.initial_viewer_support: at least one psionic asset / viewer

choose the first real remote workflow surface for administrator and viewer interaction
decide whether the first persistence layer is database-first, file-first, or hybrid
define the minimum blind or partially blind operating protocol
define the first basic analysis and review outputs
prove one end-to-end Hermes session loop cleanly
blockers: the first remote interaction surface has not yet been chosen
